tasks.title: Run deploy-local.sh + document OpenCode restart
tasks.verification: Deploy verified end-to-end. scripts/deploy-local.sh --fix copied 5 agents (adv-atc, adv-engineer, adv-researcher, adv-reviewer, adv) to global. adv-tron.md correctly stayed repo-local. Global agents count 6→7 confirms adv-reviewer.md is the new addition. Restart requirement recorded as convention wisdom for archive/release ingestion. Pre-existing user-config plugin-path warning is unrelated to this change.
tasks.summary: Three steps: (1) ./scripts/deploy-local.sh --dry-run --diff confirmed adv-reviewer.md in copy list, adv-tron.md skipped (repo-local), overlay agents preserved; (2) ./scripts/deploy-local.sh --fix executed real deploy — Agents in global: 6→7, adv-reviewer.md present at ~/.config/opencode/agents/adv-reviewer.md (19437 bytes, 409 lines); (3) adv_wisdom_add type=convention recorded the OpenCode restart requirement for /adv-archive Phase ingestion into CHANGELOG/release notes. Pre-existing config validation warning about plugin path is user-local config drift unrelated to this change.
tasks.implementation_summary: Three steps: (1) ./scripts/deploy-local.sh --dry-run --diff confirmed adv-reviewer.md in copy list, adv-tron.md skipped (repo-local), overlay agents preserved; (2) ./scripts/deploy-local.sh --fix executed real deploy — Agents in global: 6→7, adv-reviewer.md present at ~/.config/opencode/agents/adv-reviewer.md (19437 bytes, 409 lines); (3) adv_wisdom_add type=convention recorded the OpenCode restart requirement for /adv-archive Phase ingestion into CHANGELOG/release notes. Pre-existing config validation warning about plugin path is user-local config drift unrelated to this change.

wisdom.content: OpenCode restart required after agent asset deploy. Adding or modifying `.opencode/agents/*.md` files takes effect only after `scripts/deploy-local.sh --fix` copies them to `~/.config/opencode/agents/` AND OpenCode session(s) are restarted. Agent loading is config-time only; running sessions continue using cached agent list until restart. CHANGELOG and release notes for changes that ship new bundled-global agents MUST include explicit "Restart OpenCode" instruction. Verified for removePhantomSubAgent: `adv-reviewer.md` deployed to global (7 agents total, +1) but unusable in running sessions until restart.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal via inline Tier A reply: "approve". Proposal includes problem statement, success criteria, scope, constraints, and discovery agenda.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery complete. All 8 protocol steps passed. Agreement with typed contract (11 AC, 5 C, 4 DONT, 3 OOS, 11 SC) persisted. No CRITICAL/HIGH ambiguity findings. All clarification findings resolved. AC approved by user at Phase 4.5.1.

design.approval_evidence: Design complete. Architecture: phantom-routing cleanup + adv-reviewer introduction. Validator verdict: CAUTION → both clarifications addressed inline (Decision 1a: rationale for separate agent; Decision 3a: scope-discovery escalation contract). No structural design changes required. No user-value tradeoffs; no contract-compromise risk. Auto-continuing to /adv-prep.

planning.approval_evidence: Planning complete. 13 tasks synthesized from design: 3 asset tests + 1 new agent (inline TDD) + 8 doc/asset edits + 2 verification/deploy tasks. Strict validation passed with only NO_DELTAS warning (accepted: asset-test enforcement substitutes for spec.json deltas per design Decision 4). User approved via inline Tier A reply: "approve". Auto-continuing to /adv-apply.

execution.approval_evidence: All 13 tasks done. 3 new asset tests (phantom-roster, adv-reviewer, deploy-exclusion) pass. New adv-reviewer.md agent created, deployed via scripts/deploy-local.sh --fix (global agents 6→7). 8 doc surfaces cleaned of phantom routing + 1 P23 campsite scope (adv-task.md). Full plugin test suite green (2423 passed, 2 skipped). pnpm run check clean (typecheck + lint + format). OpenCode restart requirement recorded as convention wisdom for archive ingestion.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work via inline Tier A reply: "accept". All 11 AC verified: AC1 (phantom routing eliminated, 9 surfaces clean), AC2 (research → adv-researcher), AC3 (prioritizer skill-only), AC4 (adv-reviewer with correct tool boundary), AC5 (REVIEWER_REPORT schema), AC6 (scope_drift/stop_and_report contract), AC7 (prep/review/harden routing), AC8 (asset tests catch drift), AC9 (deploy/sync coverage), AC10 (tests + deploy-local.sh --fix clean), AC11 (restart requirement recorded as wisdom). Full suite green (2423 passed). Proceeding to /adv-harden inline.

release.approval_evidence: Harden complete. 6-dimension review: (1) Test coverage — 3 new asset tests, 89 assertions, 2423 total green; (2) AI-slop — no TODO/FIXME/HACK markers, no debug logs, no stubs in 4 new files; (3) Doc hygiene — 9 markdown surfaces preserve formatting/voice/column widths; (4) Cleanup — no leftover artifacts; (5) Production readiness — adv-reviewer tool boundary enforced by asset test, scope drift contract documented + example, mirrors proven adv-engineer pattern; (6) Deployment readiness — scripts/deploy-local.sh --fix verified, global agents 6→7, restart requirement recorded as convention wisdom. Diffstat: 13 files / +1016 / -100 — matches design's affected components list exactly.

clarify_findings.message: Scope section is empty or placeholder. What specific files/modules will change?
